method: values cross-referenced against the GivEnergy Installer app v1.154.3

write_model.note: no save/commit step; SET_COMMAND_SAVE(HR1001) defined for read-back only, never written; 5s pacing between writes; write scale = inverse of decode divide_by

percell_265.path: FC04 read-input, device band 0x50-0x6F (one per BMU/module), start 60, count 60
percell_265.note: 16-bit big-endian; prior probes only ever swept the 0x70+ BCU band, hence missed it
